summary: DIA acquisition parameters are well-configured. Instrument calibration current. One minor suggestion for isolation window documentation.

findings.title: Isolation window scheme not documented in method file
findings.message: The DIA isolation window scheme (18 windows × 25 Th, shifted by 1 Th for overlap) is configured correctly in the instrument method but is not documented in the acquisition method metadata file. Future method changes may inadvertently break compatibility with the spectral library which was built for this specific window scheme.
findings.impact: No correctness impact. Documentation gap only.
findings.recommendation: Add a comment block to dia_method.xml documenting the window scheme parameters and the library version it was built for: '# DIA scheme: 18 windows, 25 Th width, 1 Th overlap. Library: Spectronaut v17 direct-DIA from same cohort.'
